GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [c_last_name@0 ASC, c_first_name@1 ASC, sales@2 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[c_last_name@0 ASC, c_first_name@1 ASC, sales@2 ASC], fetch=100
    InterleaveExec
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_last_name@0 as c_last_name, c_first_name@1 as c_first_name, sum(catalog_sales.cs_quantity * catalog_sales.cs_list_price)@2 as sales]

--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
  GpuSortExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
    InterleaveExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
        GpuAggregateExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
              GpuAggregateExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=84, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=84, subtree_max_row_bytes=196

                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=88, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=88, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
                          GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=88, subtree_max_row_bytes=196

                                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=92, subtree_max_row_bytes=196
